customer_name.evidence: Main Sandeep Jha CS toh hun

occupation_detail.evidence: Main Sandeep Jha CS toh hun

temperature.evidence: Sir kya baccho wali baat karte ho, don't talk to me.

objections.quote: Pata nahi kya bole ja rahe ho bhaiya, tum toh keh rahe ho 36% return, duniya mein koi de sakta hai toh uska naam batao.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Main financial consultant. Main Sandeep Jha CS toh hun, mere ko malum hai kaun kitni return de sakta hai

decision_maker_status.evidence: Main financial consultant. Main Sandeep Jha CS toh hun

agent_promises: 36% income from first year for whole life

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer is a financial expert who recognized the product pitch as misleading/fraudulent.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is a financial professional (CS) who identified the agent's claims as fraudulent/absurd and explicitly told the agent not to talk to him.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced himself as calling from HDFC Life regarding a new guaranteed plan, and the customer responded politely.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was initially passive but became hostile and confrontational once the agent made unrealistic financial claims.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer revealed he is a CS (Company Secretary) and challenged the agent's 36% return claim as impossible.
call_narrative.ending: The customer shut down the conversation by calling out the agent's lack of credibility and telling him not to talk to him.

key_quotes: Pata nahi kya bole ja rahe ho bhaiya, tum toh keh rahe ho 36% return, duniya mein koi de sakta hai toh uska naam batao.
Main financial consultant. Main Sandeep Jha CS toh hun, mere ko malum hai kaun kitni return de sakta hai
Sir kya baccho wali baat karte ho, don't talk to me.
